name: GIGABYTE Z790 D DDR4 LGA 1700 Intel Z790 ATX Motherboard with DDR4, Triple M.2, PCIe 5.0, USB 3.2 Gen2X2 Type-C, 2.5GbE LAN, PCIe EZ-Latch, Multi-Key

description: High-end ATX motherboard for Intel 12th-14th gen processors with DDR4 support, PCIe 5.0, and advanced connectivity features.
